div.h1: Restaurant Voice Agent on AMD GPUs
div.p: QR → WebRTC → self-hosted ROCm pipeline → MCP menu tools

g.text: 3 · AMD GPU SERVER — ROCm + Docker (fits in 24 GB VRAM, e.g. 7900 XTX)

text.tspan: CPU only · turn-taking · interruptions · streaming glue
Your MCP Server — Railway / Fly.io / small VPS
staff admin panel toggles stock live
printer or tablet receives the order
confirmation read back to the guest
